twitter_thread: 70% of side hustles fail due to poor financial planning, with the average entrepreneur losing $10k in the first year.
Virtual assistance and online tutoring can generate $25/hour, while affiliate marketing can earn $1k/month with the right strategy.
Allocate 50% of side hustle income to expenses, 30% to savings, and 20% to disposable income to stay profitable.
Using a single bank account for personal and business finances can cost you $5k in tax deductions alone.
Tools like QuickBooks and Wave can save you 10 hours/month in expense tracking and tax prep.
A $5k investment in a SEP-IRA can grow to $20k in 10 years, providing a safety net for your side hustle.
What's the most effective way you've found to manage the financial aspects of your side hustle? #sidehustle #financetips
pack.linkedin: 70% of side hustles fail due to poor financial planning, resulting in an average loss of $10k in the first year. To avoid this, allocate your side hustle income using the 50/30/20 rule and separate your personal and business finances to save $5k in tax deductions. Utilize tools like QuickBooks or Wave to save 10 hours/month in expense tracking and tax prep. Investing $5k in a SEP-IRA can also grow to $20k in 10 years. What strategies have you found most effective in managing the financial aspects of your side hustle?
tiktok_hooks: Losing $10k in your side hustle's first year? Here's how to stop the bleed.
Ready to turn your side hustle into a $1k/month machine?
Tired of living paycheck to paycheck? Build a $20k safety net with your side hustle.
pack.reddit_headline: Can a Side Hustle Really Generate $1k/month?
